<?php namespace Illuminate\Queue\Console; use Illuminate\Console\Command; use Symfony\Component\Console\Attribute\AsCommand; #[AsCommand(name: 'queue:forget')] class ForgetFailedCommand extends Command { /** * The console command signature. * * @var string */ protected $signature = 'queue:forget {id : The ID of the failed job}'; /** * The console command description. * * @var string */ protected $description = 'Delete a failed queue job'; /** * Execute the console command. * * @return int|null */ public function handle() { if ($this->laravel['queue.failer']->forget($this->argument('id'))) { $this->components->info('Failed job deleted successfully.'); } else { $this->components->error('No failed job matches the given ID.'); return 1; } } }
